label: founders_of_devtools_ai_startups
description: Illustrative Tier 1 examples for founders of devtools or AI startups. These are grounding examples, not scoring rules.
examples: founder of an AI coding tool startup
co-founder of a developer API platform
technical founder of an observability startup
CTO/co-founder of an AI agent infrastructure company
founder of a developer workflow automation startup
founder of a named demo-category devtools/AI product company
notes: Use the Tier 1 scoring rules in icp_spec.json first.
These examples anchor the intended profile; they are not an allowlist.
